sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking blue blob
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before nodes:", len(before['nodes']), "After nodes:", len(after['nodes']))
print()

# Check for changes
changed = False
for nid, n in after_nodes.items():
    if nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        if n['boundary'] != bn['boundary'] or n['color'] != bn['color'] or n['pixels'] != bn['pixels']:
            changed = True
            print(f"Node {nid} CHANGED: color={bn['color']}->{n['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}->{n['pixels']}")
    else:
        changed = True
        print(f"Node {nid} NEW: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

for nid, n in before_nodes.items():
    if nid not in after_nodes:
        changed = True
        print(f"Node {nid} DISAPPEARED: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

if not changed:
    print("NO CHANGES detected - clicking blue blob did nothing")

# Let me try ACTION7 instead
action(['ACTION7'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
